final:
module top_module (
    input [3:0] a, 
    input sel, 
    output reg [3:0] y);always @(*) 
    case (sel)
        0: y = a << 1;
        1: y = a >> 1;
    endcase
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y = a & 4'hF; // Misleading assignment to y
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: y = a & 4'hF; // Misleading assignment to y
